notes: Lesson 20 Part 2 (act 118), 'Autocomplete', 106.5s, 6 short cues. Trie {cat,car,card,cart}; prefix 'car' → completions car/card/cart; 'cat' is the pruned branch (under ca not car). Uses trie.py idiom (subtree recolor, end rings). Two review iterations: authored + manim -s smoke (fixed Cue02 bottom-note overflow), then full -ql render + READ start/mid/end all 6 cues.
